rag_rules: Fix AGREE assume statement type errors by resolving root identifier references or removing invalid clauses
Ensure AGREE expressions in implementation scopes reference only valid subcomponent paths and outputs
generic_rules: Validate AGREE contract expressions resolve to boolean types before model compilation
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes, not component type annexes
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE assume/guarantee expressions must evaluate to 'bool' type
Component type contracts may not reference implementation-specific subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model dependencies
Do not place implementation-level references in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: Component type vs implementation scope rules
